message:
test(fuzz): RateLimitDeclarations validate gates (gxjxu)

Add fuzz_ratelimit_validate covering RateLimitDeclarations::validate,
RateLimitPool::validate, RateLimitConfig::validate (ratelimit.rs:74-194).
Cross-checks against an in-target reference scan that traces the same
error precedence as the production validator. Properties: 10
RateLimitDeclarationError variants — ZeroRequests, ZeroWindow,
ZeroBurst, EmptyPoolId, DuplicatePoolId, EmptyToolName, EmptyToolPools,
EmptyToolPoolId, DuplicateToolPool, UnknownPool — plus valid-pass and
empty-Ok cases. Once-gated anchors verify each error variant on
hand-picked inputs and confirm pool validate delegates to config
validate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1078,5 +1078,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_ratelimit_validate"
+path = "fuzz_targets/ratelimit_validate.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
